origin.label: Times Square, Manhattan Community Board 5, Manhattan

destination.label: Brooklyn Bridge, Old Dock Street, Dumbo

routeSteps.destinations: Brooklyn Bridge, Manhattan Civic Center, New York Presbyterian Lower Manhattan Hospital, Pace University

hazards.label: Sharp turn
hazards.description: Sharp turn of 90° — requires attention and reduced speed.
hazards.tip: Slow down before this turn and stay in the correct lane.

hazards.label: Tunnel
hazards.description: Tunnel ahead — reduced visibility, possible GPS loss, and changing conditions.
hazards.tip: Remove sunglasses, turn on headlights, maintain lane position, and avoid stopping.

hazards.label: Traffic Light
hazards.tip: Watch for stale green lights and prepare to stop if yellow.

hazards.label: Get in right lane early
hazards.description: You need to turn right in 296m onto FDR Drive. Get into the right lane as soon as you enter East 36th Street.
hazards.tip: Move to the right lane immediately — the turn comes up fast and you won't have time to change lanes later.

hazards.label: Traffic Light
hazards.tip: Watch for stale green lights and prepare to stop if yellow.

hazards.label: Tunnel

hazards.label: Traffic Calming (no)
hazards.description: Traffic calming measure: no. Expect speed reduction.
hazards.tip: Reduce speed and watch for pedestrians or cyclists.

hazards.label: Traffic Light
hazards.tip: Watch for stale green lights and prepare to stop if yellow.

hazards.label: On ramp
hazards.description: Highway on ramp — lane change under speed.
hazards.tip: Signal early and adjust speed for the ramp.

hazards.label: Merge
hazards.description: Merge onto FDR Drive — check speed and blind spots.
hazards.tip: Match traffic speed and find your gap early.

hazards.label: Yield / Give Way
hazards.description: Yield sign ahead — give way to cross traffic.
hazards.tip: Slow down and be prepared to stop if cross traffic is present.

hazards.label: Stop Sign
hazards.description: Stop sign ahead — full stop required.
hazards.tip: Come to a complete stop and check for cross traffic before proceeding.

hazards.label: Get in left lane early
hazards.description: You need to turn slight left in 67m onto the next road. Get into the left lane as soon as you enter this road.
hazards.tip: Move to the left lane immediately — the turn comes up fast and you won't have time to change lanes later.

hazards.label: Fork
hazards.description: Road forks — choose the correct branch for your destination.
hazards.tip: Read signs early and commit to your lane before the fork.

hazards.label: Yield / Give Way
hazards.description: Yield sign ahead — give way to cross traffic.
hazards.tip: Slow down and be prepared to stop if cross traffic is present.

hazards.label: Traffic Light
hazards.tip: Watch for stale green lights and prepare to stop if yellow.

hazards.label: Get in right lane early
hazards.description: You need to turn right in 161m onto Brooklyn Bridge. Get into the right lane as soon as you enter Ari Halbertam Memorial Ramp.
hazards.tip: Move to the right lane immediately — the turn comes up fast and you won't have time to change lanes later.

hazards.label: Stop Sign
hazards.description: Stop sign ahead — full stop required.
hazards.tip: Come to a complete stop and check for cross traffic before proceeding.
